text:
In a small, sunlit town nestled between rolling hills and a sparkling river, lived a young shepherd named Leo. His favorite pastime was to wander the vast stretches of the field, accompanied by his loyal but ever-jesting sheepdog, Fido. One radiant morning, as the dew still glistened on the grass, Leo decided it was a fine day for sheep shearing.

Fido was always up for an adventure. Following Leo, Fido bounded through the meadow, picking up scents and giving out playful woofs. The sheep, accustomed to the two, were contented at first. That is until Leo, eager to start the day's work, suddenly yanked on Fido, intending to redirect his enthusiasm.

The sheep, misinterpreting Leo's sudden pull as an urgent command, stampeded. Before Leo could grasp Fido's leashes, a rogue woolly mass shot past. Leo's foot slipped, and with a clatter, Fido was off
